text:
幻創大和艦砲の破壊に成功しました！
これで幻創大和は無力化できた……？
……けど、この反応は！？

異常値を計測！
揚陸艇にて回収に向かいます！
一時退避を！！

The Phantasm Yamato's naval guns have been
successfully destroyed! That should neutralize
it-- Wait, what's this reading!?

Detecting extremely abnormal values! A landing
craft will retrieve you! Retreat for now!
